meaning: adj.不起皱的,不骚动的,不混乱的,安静的
examples: He remained unruffled by their accusations.
When coming across complicated problems, he would remain unruffled and take them calmly.
Mr Thaksin seems unruffled by such talk.
Unruffled by Wall Street's hot breath, SAS appears to be a placid place to work.
Some are nervous but Finn was calm, unruffled and phlegmatic and he looked like he belonged.
